channel.title: GitHub SCSS Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: pmarsceill/just-the-docs
item.description: A modern, high customizable, responsive Jekyll theme for documention with built-in search.

item.description: Logseq dev theme

item.description: A minimal, sidebar, responsive web design Jekyll theme that focuses on text presentation.

item.description: A reference example for TypeScript and Node with a detailed README describing how to use the two together.

item.description: The Compose specification

item.description: 🐬 A comprehensive tutorial on getting started with Docker!

item.description: A boilerplate for Sass projects using the 7-1 architecture pattern from Sass Guidelines.

item.description: MacOS Big Sur like theme for Gnome desktops

item.description: Minima is a one-size-fits-all Jekyll theme for writers.

item.description: A website to list all French speakers content creators talking about Technologies.

item.description: ⚡️ A minimal portfolio template for Developers

item.description: Launch your Static Jekyll Site/Blog 🚀 in minutes built for developers.

item.description: A tiny CSS framework for building faithful recreations of the Windows 7 UI.
